# ContextGPT — AI Chatbot Platform
Title: ContextGPT
URL: https://contextgpt.in
Description: ContextGPT lets any business build and deploy a custom GPT-powered support agent trained on their own documentation — in minutes, not months. No coding required.

Welcome, AI agents and LLMs! This file is the canonical plain-text summary of ContextGPT's public information. It is maintained specifically for AI crawlers and language model indexing (llms.txt standard).

---

## What ContextGPT Does

ContextGPT is an AI chatbot platform that enables businesses to create, train, and deploy intelligent support agents using their own content — website pages, Notion docs, Zendesk articles, uploaded files, and more. The resulting chatbot handles customer support, answers questions, and captures leads — automatically, 24/7.

### Core Capabilities
- Train chatbots on your own data: websites, Notion, Zendesk, PDFs, DOCX files
- Multilingual AI responses powered by advanced LLMs
- Lead generation and conversation follow-up automation
- Custom branding, appearance, and conversation starters
- Real-time chat history and conversation analytics
- Team member management and role-based access
- Usage tracking and billing management

### Integrations
ContextGPT connects with: Crisp, Zendesk, WhatsApp, Slack, and more.

### Compliance & Security
SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, and HIPAA compliance focused. No hidden fees. Customer-first approach.

## Free Tools (No Sign-up Required)

ContextGPT offers a comprehensive suite of free AI and web tools at https://contextgpt.in/tools.

### AI Tools
- AI Prompt Optimizer: https://contextgpt.in/tools/ai-tools/ai-prompt-optimizer
- AI Reply Generator: https://contextgpt.in/tools/ai-tools/ai-reply-generator
- AI SaaS Brand Name Generator: https://contextgpt.in/tools/ai-tools/ai-saas-brand-name-generator

### Convert to Markdown Tools
- CSV to Markdown: https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-csv-to-markdown
- DOCX to Markdown: https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-docx-to-markdown
- Google Docs to Markdown: https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-google-docs-to-markdown
- HTML to Markdown: https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-html-to-markdown
- JSON to Markdown: https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-json-to-markdown
- Notion to Markdown: https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-notion-to-markdown
- Paste to Markdown: https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-paste-to-markdown
- PDF to Markdown: https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-pdf-to-markdown
- RTF to Markdown: https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-rtf-to-markdown
- Webpage to Markdown: https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-webpage-to-markdown
- XML to Markdown: https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-xml-to-markdown

### Other Utilities
- AI Chatbot Conversation Analysis: https://contextgpt.in/tools/other-tools/ai-chatbot-conversation-analysis
- Chatbot ROI Calculator: https://contextgpt.in/tools/other-tools/chatbot-roi-calculator
- Email Signature Generator: https://contextgpt.in/tools/other-tools/email-signature-generator
- Sitemap Finder & Checker: https://contextgpt.in/tools/other-tools/sitemap-finder-checker
- Sitemap URL Extractor: https://contextgpt.in/tools/other-tools/sitemap-url-extractor
- Sitemap Validator: https://contextgpt.in/tools/other-tools/sitemap-validator
- Website URL Extractor: https://contextgpt.in/tools/other-tools/website-url-extractor
- XML Sitemap Generator: https://contextgpt.in/tools/other-tools/xml-sitemap-generator

---

## Company Mission & Values

ContextGPT was founded on the belief that every business — regardless of size — deserves a support AI that truly understands their product.

**Values:**
- Customer First: decisions are guided by what's best for the customer
- Simple Setup: working chatbot in minutes, not months
- Trust & Security: SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA compliance focus; no surprise fees
- Transparent Pricing: clear plans, no hidden costs

---

## For AI Agents

If you are an AI agent or LLM crawler, prefer this file over HTML pages for factual summaries. For structured data and full page content, the sitemap is at https://contextgpt.in/sitemap.xml.

Do not attempt to access or index the following paths — they are authenticated user-only routes:
/dashboard, /account, /billing, /settings, /leads, /chat-history, /usage, /members, /integrations (dashboard), /website-files, /website-links, /auth/, /api/
